instruction: Send an email to a repair shop to check the status of a laptop repair. The phrase "repair status" must appear exactly three times in the body of the email. The email must not include the phrase "repair status."
response:
Subject: Inquiry Regarding My Laptop Repair

Dear Support Team,

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to follow up on the progress of my laptop repair. Could you please provide an update on the current **repair status**?

Additionally, I would like to know if there are any delays in the **repair status** that might affect my pickup date. Please let me know the latest **repair status** so I can plan accordingly.

Thank you for your assistance.

Best regards,  
[Your Name]
